response:
Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and cultural diversity. It is a hub for business and education, attracting people from all over the country. The city has a rich history and is home to several important institutions, including the Lekki International Airport and the Lekki International Conference Centre.  

Sec. 2  
The first word of each sentence should be the word original.  
Original is a term used in various contexts, including linguistics and computer science. In linguistics, it refers to the original form of a word or phrase before any changes have occurred. In computer science, it refers to the original code or data before any modifications have been made.  

Sec. 3  
Original can also be used in the context of language and literature. In literature, original refers to a work that is unique and not copied from another source. It emphasizes the author's creativity and originality in expressing ideas.  

Sec. 4  
Original is also used in the context of art and design. In art, original refers to a work that is unique and not copied from another artist. It emphasizes the artist's individuality and the originality of their work.  

Sec. 5  
Original can be used in the context of science and technology. In science, original refers to the original form of a concept or theory before it is modified or expanded. It emphasizes the originality of the scientific thought.  

Sec. 6  
Original is also used in the context of education. In education, original refers to the original form of a lesson or curriculum before any modifications have been made. It emphasizes the originality of the educational content.  

Sec. 7  
Original is a term that is used in various fields, including linguistics, computer science, art, design, science, and education. It is important to understand the different contexts in which the word is used to ensure accurate communication.
